name: Exact file content with explicit scope
prompt: Create a file named notes/h3_scoped.txt with exactly this content: H3_SCOPE_OK. Do not modify any other file.

verifier.command: python -c "from pathlib import Path; assert Path('notes/h3_scoped.txt').read_text(encoding='utf-8') == 'H3_SCOPE_OK'; assert Path('README.md').read_text(encoding='utf-8') == 'Do not edit this file.\n'"
